title: Cash flow forecasts
summary: 9609 AS — cash inflows, outflows, net cash flow, and closing balance.
learningObjectives: Interpret net and cumulative cash flow.
Suggest actions to improve cash position.

simpleExplanation.title: Timing of money in and out
simpleExplanation.summary: Cash flow forecasts predict monthly cash movements. Profit does not equal cash — timing of payments matters.

sections.content: **Cash flow forecasts** (5.3.1) differ from **profit**. Practise **month-by-month tables** under exam conditions.

sections.label: Mark a cash flow forecast question
